violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust presence throughout unit (due to travel on dirt roads). *Owners plan to silicone/caulk junctures throughout unit as soon as they are able to pull everything out for a deep clean.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Debris at can opener blade. -Residue on cooling (staging) racks used above freezer.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust residue at high surfaces and edges throughout unit.
